chapter_title.ar: باب الْفَيْ‏ءِ وَ الْأَنْفَالِ وَ تَفْسِيرِ الْخُمُسِ وَ حُدُودِهِ وَ مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 130 – Al-Fey (Military gains) and Al-Anfal (Non-military gains) and the interpretation of Al-Khums (A fifth of military gains) and its limits and what it is Obligated upon

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/270)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/270)
text: هُ سُئِلَ عَنْ مَعَادِنِ الذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ وَ الْحَدِيدِ وَ الرَّصَاصِ وَ الصُّفْرِ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهَا الْخُمُسُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about the mines of gold, and the silver, and the iron, and the brass, and the zinc. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon it is the Khums (the fifth)’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ahmad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr who has said the following. “Once a person asked al-Rida (a.s.) about the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most gracious, “Know that whatever property you may gain, one fifth belongs to God, the Messenger, the kindred,. .” [8:41] It then was asked, “The portion that belongs to Allah to who does it go?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “It belongs to the Messenger of Allah and whatever belongs to the Messenger of Allah it belongs to the Imam.” Another question said, “If one of the categories of welfare recipient would more and the other category less then how it is dealt with?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “It is left to the discretion of the Imam consider how the Messenger of Allah dealt with such cases. Is it not the case that he used his own discretion and distribute as he would consider proper? The Imam would deal with such case in the same way.”
